emails.subject: Taped Lines
emails.body: Taped Lines John and Michael would like to put together training for London-based traders on the "dos and don'ts" of using recorded telephone lines As part of this we're listening to tapes to pick up on some "don'ts" (eg racist comments, harrassment, breach of SFA rules etc) which we can possibly use as case studies (you'll be pleased to hear that so far we haven't found anything of this nature!). Have you given any training on this subject to traders in Houston? Any materials you may have used or thoughts you have on this would be very much appreciated. Thanks a lot. Paul

emails.subject: Re: Taped Lines
emails.body: Re: Taped Lines Paul: We do Sales Practices training which gets into some of what your are suggesting. I think it is a good idea to take it further with a list of "don'ts". We can get you are training materials. We are in the process of uploading all training materials including videos into various websites. Mark Paul Simons 08/24/2000 06:04 AM
